title: capsella lacerata
intro: Capsella lacerata, also known as cut-leaved shepherd's purse, is a biennial flowering plant of the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate menstruation and reduce heavy bleeding due to its estrogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Capsella lacerata include its use as an emmenagogue to regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate symptoms of PMS, and even help with postpartum recovery. Capsella lacerata can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from menstrual-related issues.
